name: claude-code-watchdog
description: Watchdog — watches the agent and re-feeds the same prompt until the task genuinely stops producing file edits. Derived from Anthropic's ralph-loop, Apache 2.0.

plugins.name: watchdog
plugins.description: A self-referential loop for Claude Code that re-feeds the user's prompt until the task truly stops producing file edits. Uses a headless Haiku classifier to judge convergence, requires the agent to actually call tools before exit (no pure-text 'done' claims), and is hidden from the agent so it cannot cheat. Per-session state keyed by TERM_SESSION_ID. Apache 2.0, derived from ralph-loop.
